method: COMMENT_EVALUATION — M08 A6/A7 redirect batch (researcher-approved 2026-06-02). Faculty registries (mind 112, heart 183) route by CONTENT per comment, not to one home. Non-faculty registries route to their approved homes. Data-error/pipeline flags resolved+closed. HELD for joint review (not in this spec): A6 115, 352 (structural), 356, 357 (heart structural); A7 86 (pride 123 -> M08 finding evaluation).

new_flags.description: Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-42-001, wa_session_b_findings id 40; delight reg 42 -> M04). Delight vocabulary spans every inner-being dimension; suggests delight is a family of engagements organised around the axis of what the inner person is oriented toward. When M04 (Joy, Gladness and Delight) is analysed, map this orientation axis as the structuring principle. Full text on the folded source.

Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-42-002, id 41; delight reg 42 -> M04). H2654A chaphets and H2654B chaphats produce parallel three-group structures with equivalent classifications; lexical question whether the two forms are one semantic range or carry distinguishable nuances. For M04 analysis.

new_flags.cluster_link_basis: hedone (pleasure/passions-at-war) -> M28 Envy, Greed and Lust
new_flags.description: Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-42-003, id 42; delight reg 42, subject hedone). Group 3090-001 (hedone — pleasure as the competing inner orientation, desires that war within, Jas 4:1) is the adversary of the will toward God. When M28 (Envy, Greed and Lust) is analysed, examine hedone as the fleshly-desire counter-orientation. For M28.

new_flags.cluster_link_basis: boldness reg 16 -> M34 Perseverance, Endurance and Steadfastness
new_flags.description: Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-16-001, id 77; boldness reg 16 -> M34). parresia (G3954/3955) shows a tripartite inner-being structure: access to God in prayer/worship; apostolic proclamation against opposition; relational openness. For M34 analysis.

new_flags.cluster_link_basis: self-control reg 142 -> M19 Trust, Confidence and Security
new_flags.description: Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-142-001, id 84; self-control reg 142 -> M19). Self-governance vocabulary operates in three registers: human self-control as character virtue; human volitional restraint; Spirit-gift of self-discipline. For M19 analysis.

new_flags.cluster_link_basis: will reg 173 -> M29 Desire, Longing and Will
new_flags.description: Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-173-001, id 125; will reg 173 -> M29). The will registry shows the widest dimension spread; needs sub-cluster taxonomy of which groups name the volitional core. For M29 analysis.

Routed from M08 A7 (DIM-173-002, id 126; will reg 173 -> M29). The halakh (to go/walk) groups form a coherent inner-being sub-cluster: inner movement as metaphor for inner orientation (toward God, toward idols). For M29 analysis.

resolve_flags.resolved_note: Resolved as data-error (Session D moot). PH2-042-002: H4100 mah / H0227A az incorrectly extracted into delight (884 occ, not delight vocabulary); already reclassified to delete. Database artifact, not a finding. Closed.
Resolved as data-error. PH2-112-001: mimnesko occurrence_count field anomaly (194 vs 2 verses); verse pool correct. Database artifact. Closed.
Resolved as data-error. PH2-112-002: mnaomai occurrence_count anomaly (6 vs 21 verses); verse pool correct. Closed.
Resolved as data-error. PH2-112-003: chashav occurrence_count anomaly (9 vs 26 verses); verse pool correct. Closed.
Resolved as pipeline-process note. DIM-112-SD007: false-positive cross-registry roots (string-match artifacts in the CC rootfamily extract — AT, YATSA homonyms). Not a finding. Closed.
